total_items.description: The total number of entities (e.g. services, organizations) returned

page_number.description: The number of the current page

size.description: The number of entities in the current page.

first_page.description: A Boolean value indicating if this is the first page

last_page.description: A Boolean value indicating if this is the last page

empty.description: A Boolean value indicating if there is an empty result set
